prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime illustration of an elegant fantasy fashion woman named Lilva posing in a glittering nighttime city street. She is shown from upper thighs to head in a low-angle, glamorous three-quarter composition, leaning casually with one hand lifted near her lips and the other relaxed near her hip. Her face is intentionally obscured by a centered opaque square censor block in muted mauve-gray, covering the eyes, nose, and mouth while leaving the hair, ear, jawline, and jewelry visible. She has very long flowing silvery ice-blue hair with luminous strands, wind-swept volume, and sharp anime linework. Her skin is pale and softly glowing. She wears a luxurious white and silver cropped outfit: ribbed sleeveless crop top, translucent draped sash across the chest, fitted high-waisted white trousers with a black belt and gold buckle, and a loose semi-transparent white jacket sliding off the shoulders. Add intricate celestial jewelry and accessories: exactly 9 visible jewelry groups consisting of a jeweled ear cuff and dangling blue gemstone earrings on one ear, a thin choker with blue gem, layered delicate necklaces with blue crystal pendants, bracelets on the raised wrist, rings on both hands, a gold chain belt detail, a dangling waist charm with crystal, a gold wristwatch bracelet on the lowered wrist, and a long hanging blue crystal tassel charm from that wrist. Include star, moon, and diamond motifs, tiny chains, faceted sapphire-blue crystals, metallic gold accents, and glossy manicured nails in pale blue. The background is a dreamy upscale urban night scene with ornate building facades, warm street lamps, illuminated shop windows, a dark hanging sign with a crest-like emblem, reflective stone and metal surfaces, falling sparkling particles, bokeh lights, and magical glowing shards. Use a cool lavender, silver, blue, and white palette with warm gold highlights, strong rim lighting from the right, soft bloom, lens sparkle effects, crisp clean line art, highly polished rendering, detailed fabric texture, translucent materials, and a luxurious ethereal atmosphere. Keep the composition unchanged: portrait 3:4 aspect ratio, character centered and filling most of the frame, hair sweeping across the left side, raised hand near the left side of the censor block, exposed shoulder on the right, no readable text, no watermark, no extra characters.
